name: ASUS Pro Q870M-C-CSM motherboard supports Intel Core Ultra (Series 2) & vPro, DDR5, PCIe 5.0 x16, M.2, DisplayPort, HDMI, USB 10Gbps, TPM IC, and ACCE
shortName: ASUS Pro Q870M-C-CSM motherboard supports Intel Core Ultra (Series 2)
description: Professional micro-ATX motherboard with Intel Core Ultra Series 2 support, PCIe 5.0, DDR5, and vPro for business computing.
